programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: Concentrates on Hitlers attempts in the latter end of 1944 to shift the balance of power back in his favour.

programme.title: King Edward I - Longshanks From Braveheart
programme.desc: King Edward I, born in 1239, was raised in a time of political turmoil and martial abilities.

programme.title: The Endurance: Shackletons Legendary Antarctic Expedition
programme.desc: Explorer Ernest Shackleton and his team become stranded for nearly two years in severe antarctic conditions. Narrated by Liam Neeson.

programme.title: The Rise of Napoleon Bonaparte A Military Prodigy
programme.desc: Napoleon Bonaparte, born in 1769 in Corsica, came from minor nobility and claimed Roman heritage.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: The war in the Pacific against Japan was a savage hand-to-hand, island-to-island struggle, fought by new specialist fighting units like the valiant Chindits.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: Allied forces converge on Germany, uncovering the horrors of Belsen and Buchenwald, before pushing towards Berlin, where Hitler clings to power in his last desperate days.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: With Germany beaten, the Allies turned their attention to Japan, who made them pay for every inch of gained ground. How was this last, great foe overcome?

programme.title: Barbarossa: The Lost Diaries
programme.desc: Lieutenant Sander undertakes an arduous journey to Leningrad, revealing the harsh German east campaign of Operation Barbarossa. He notes down his experiences in a diary that provides us a look at the attack on the Soviet Union.

programme.title: Barbarossa: The Lost Diaries
programme.desc: Lieutenant Sander undertakes an arduous journey to Leningrad, revealing the harsh German east campaign of Operation Barbarossa. He notes down his experiences in a diary that provides us a look at the attack on the Soviet Union.

programme.title: Churchill: The Road to Victory
programme.desc: Winston Churchill served as the Prime Minister of Great Britain in arguably some of the most trying times of modern history. After Chamberlains resignation in 1940, Churchill was appointed during World War II and ultimately led the country down the road to victory.

programme.title: Edward III - Englands Greatest King
programme.desc: King Edward the Eighth of the United Kingdom, born in 1894, was raised as a future king.

programme.title: Henry V - Agincourt and The Hundred Years War
programme.desc: Henry V of England, born 1386, led during power struggles and the Hundred Years War.

programme.title: Farewell Israel: Bush, Iran and the Revolt of Islam
programme.desc: Filmmaker and Islamic history expert Joel Gilbert explores the history of the Muslim religion.

programme.title: Barbarossa: The Lost Diaries
programme.desc: Lieutenant Sander undertakes an arduous journey to Leningrad, revealing the harsh German east campaign of Operation Barbarossa. He notes down his experiences in a diary that provides us a look at the attack on the Soviet Union.

programme.title: Barbarossa: The Lost Diaries
programme.desc: Lieutenant Sander undertakes an arduous journey to Leningrad, revealing the harsh German east campaign of Operation Barbarossa. He notes down his experiences in a diary that provides us a look at the attack on the Soviet Union.

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt leads to Anglo-Saxon England, medieval Europe, China under its first Emperor and Egypt when the Pharaohs still ruled, where the origins of the curses surrounding the Staffordshire Hoard, Black Princes Ruby, and more are uncovered.

programme.title: Weird Britain
programme.desc: Andy is back in Cornwall searching for legends, meeting a real-life mermaid and fishing for Cornwalls infamous sea serpent Morgawr.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the turbulent history of Carrickfergus, one of the most ancient castles in Northern Ireland and a stronghold that holds the key to understanding the tempestuous relationship between Britain and Ireland.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Focusing on Roman Britannia, where finds include the thickening mystery of 97 baby skeletons found by the Thames, a newly discovered town in rural Devon that turns history on its head, and a Roman cult figure buried for 1700 years beneath a fort.

programme.title: Britains Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Alice Roberts explores Glasgows age of steam, from lethal diseases and industrial injury to genteel tea rooms, football at Celtic Park, and the beautiful Loch Katrine.

programme.title: Britains Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Alice Roberts explores Georgian Edinburghs finest architecture, the origins of `Auld Reekie, the roots of modern Scottishness, and some dark imperial controversies.

programme.title: Britains Secret Islands
programme.desc: An exploration of Rathlin Island, including a visit to a Neolithic stone tool factory, a unique upside-down lighthouse, and a WWII shipwreck.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Explore some of the darker elements of the MK Ultra programme, which sought out a miracle mind control method via human experimentation.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: In the final episode Dr Alice Roberts goes in search of the Tudor age, a time that saw momentous changes across all aspects of British life. Along the way Alice visits excavations at Shakespeares first theatre in Londons Shoreditch, where the Bard began his career and `Romeo and Juliet was first performed. Alice also joins a team sifting through Shakespeares rubbish at his last home in Stratford-Upon-Avon.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Focusing on Roman Britannia, where finds include the thickening mystery of 97 baby skeletons found by the Thames, a newly discovered town in rural Devon that turns history on its head, and a Roman cult figure buried for 1700 years beneath a fort.

programme.title: Invasion: The Normans
programme.desc: In 12th-century Ireland, provincial kings vie for supremacy. When two of these power players drive a rival into exile, he seeks help from Henry II, the Anglo-Norman king of England. Henrys vassal Strongbow and other Norman allies then invade Ireland with frightening power.

programme.title: Invasion: The Normans
programme.desc: Following the course of the invasion, as Strongbow wins victory after victory. In 1171, Henry II himself arrives to takes control of Ireland, and grants land there to settlers from Britain. Now, archaeology and cutting-edge science reveal their fascinating lives.

programme.title: Britains Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts tells the story of Edwardian Britain by visiting Cardiff, which grew rich selling the coal that powered the Empire. Alice hears the stories of the Edwardian miners and their backbreaking and often dangerous work.

programme.title: Britains Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts explores the English Civil War through the history of Oxford, the city at the heart of a battle between an autocratic king and his rebellious parliament.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson visits Sherwood Forest and the Peak District as he sets out to discover the real King John.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson hikes up from Lyme Regis on Dorsets Jurassic Coast to the Somerset Levels in the footsteps of a ragtag rebel army led by the dashing young Duke of Monmouth, the illegitimate son of Charles II.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: A team discovers clues to Scotlands first kingdoms, metal detectorists unearth a hoard of Viking treasure, and a new housing development reveals a graveyard of Iron Age warriors.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Finds include the lost WWI training trenches on Salisbury Plain, Britains first `double henge, discovered just down the road from Stonehenge, where the evidence suggests our ancestors feasted and made sacred offerings as part of a visit to the ritualistic Stonehenge landscape, and luxury foreign goods discovered at Tintagel, the legendary childhood home of King Arthur.

programme.title: Al Murray: Why Does Everyone Hate the British Empire?
programme.desc: Al Murray is joined by legendary master of stand-up, Anuvab Pal, to explore the truth about Britains rocky relationship with India.

programme.title: Al Murray: Why Does Everyone Hate the British Empire?
programme.desc: Al Murray pairs up with local comedians to explore the history of British colonial rule and its legacy. They find out about the origins of British rule, its impact and how its legacy continues to influence governance, culture, and attitudes.

programme.title: Shipwrecks: When History Resurfaces
programme.sub-title: Shipwrecked Sailors Of The Roman Empire
programme.desc: Kevin Sempe dives in search of wrecks harking back to the Roman Empires greatness. The journey begins with the Nave Romana.

programme.title: Shipwrecks: When History Resurfaces
programme.desc: Kevin Sempe explores the bay of Saint-Pierre in Martinique, where ships smouldered and sank following the devastating volcanic eruption of 1902.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson heads off for a 45-mile walk across Wiltshire to tell the story of life and death in the last centuries of the Stone Age. His route takes him through the greatest concentration of prehistoric sites in Europe.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: It was 30 years after the Romans invaded Britain that they were ready to take on the challenge of conquering the Lake District. Tony Robinson tracks their 50-mile walk from Penrith past Ullswater to Ambleside and on to the Irish Sea at Ravenglass.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Lucy meets a young couple expecting a baby who have to weigh up whether to live in their auction buy in Sydenham in London while Martin talks to a man and his father in law who have bought their first property together in Trentham near Stoke and Dion meets a man who only went into property development after he retired. His latest buy is a three-bed semi in West Bromwich.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Terraced houses in Tunstall in Shropshire and Prescott in Liverpool and a large flat in Dagenham are all sold under the hammer. Martin, Lucy and Dion have a look round before hearing what the new owners have planned.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A chiropodist, two part-time gardeners and a woman who works on projects in between the school run are todays investors. Theyve bought property in Bullbridge in Derbyshire, Newcastle under Lyme in Staffordshire and Wolverhampton in the West Midlands under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts follows the progress of a couple developing a chalet bungalow in Drakelowe in Staffordshire for their family, while Lucy Alexander talks to a young entrepreneur with grand plans for a three-bed semi in Croydon in London. Dion Dublin looks round a piece of land which runs alongside a tourist steam train track in Coltishall in Norfolk.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts rolls back the clock nearly 12 years to catch up on an ambitious development of a former church in Preston on the Hill in Cheshire, while Lucy Alexander looks round two very different terraced houses in Stoney Stratford, near Milton Keynes, and Streatham in London.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A 1930s terrace in Croydon, a semi in Wolstanton destined to be a family home and the only house on a street in Moorside in Oldham are all under the hammer. Martin, Lucy and Dion visit the properties and meet the new owners.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Dion Dublin visits a stone cottage in Tilton on the Hill in rural Leicestershire while Martin Roberts is at a property auction buy in Croydon on the outskirts of London and Lucy Alexander meets two friends who have bought a bungalow in Rainham in Kent.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A mid-terrace house in Chaddesdon in Derby, a two-bedroom flat in Londons Maida Vale and a property in Warrington are all sold under the hammer. Martin Roberts, Lucy Alexander and Dion Dublin meet the new owners to hear what they have planned for their auction buys.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin looks round a pretty cottage with outbuildings with huge potential in Burton upon Trent, while Lucy checks out a flat in Londons Crystal Palace and Dion is in Mossley near Manchester in a four-bedroom bungalow.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin tackles the issue of solar panels on a property in Mountain Ash in Wales and wonders if itll be a sunny outcome for the new owner, while Lucy looks round a barn in Elstree in Hertfordshire and Dion visits a flat in Newport in Shropshire.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts meets a couple who buy a former millworkers cottage in Derbyshire as their first home together; Lucy Alexander meets a father and daughter team who are seasoned developers buying a house in Kent; and Dion Dublin talks to a man who, along with two friends, has clubbed together to buy an investment property in Lowestoft in Suffolk.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Dion Dublin is in Walsall in the Midlands looking around a 1950s semi; Martin Roberts meets a man developing a ground-floor one-bedroom flat in Ilford in Essex; and Lucy Alexander catches up on a multi-million-pound redevelopment in East Horsley in Surrey where one small cottage with a big garden is converted into eight separate properties.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A house with a bathroom layout challenge in Ripley, Derbyshire, a huge three-storey house with its freehold on offer in Erdington, Birmingham, and a mid-terrace house in Londons East Ham in need of a major makeover are all sold under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: The story of everyday life in a small and tightly-knit community - this is the core of the worlds longest running prime-time drama serial and the highest-rating programme in the UK. Coronation Street has for over 50 years uniquely combined cult status with popularity and durability - the quality of writing is second to none, portraying believable characters with a large helping of humour. Its themes - love, passion, deception, greed and intrigue - are ones which everyone can relate to.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Oxfords last surviving all-female college is bidding farewell to one of its most prominent professors. During a reunion of her brightest students, one of the group is found murdered at the bottom of a flight of stairs. Lewis is convinced that the killing is connected to a brutal attack which occurred ten years before and, as the investigation progresses, he and Hathaway are drawn into the mystery of the college and its secrets.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Dennis Parker, apparently suffering from amnesia, arrives in Aidensfield looking for his wife and daughter whom he left seven years previously. After investigating the matter, Nick discovers that he is wanted for a wages snatch.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A local womans attempts to avoid her husbands advances by putting sleeping tablets in his whisky have tragic consequences, and Greengrass gets involved in illicit cockfighting.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A battle of the sexes which has raged in Broughton since the First World War comes to a head when ageing feminist Mildred Danvers is found dead after returning to her childhood home. As Barnaby investigates, the misogynist vicar Rev Gantis is shot through the head during a humiliating donkey race at the village fair. Is the killer on the side of the men or women - or do tragedies in Broughtons past hold the answer?

programme.desc: The discovery of illegal wartime ammunition leads to problems when it falls into the hands of some local children. Meanwhile, Greengrass wages a war against Lord Ashfordlys new gamekeeper, and tensions rise for Nick and Kate.

programme.desc: The preparations for Martins departure are nearly complete, and he is surprised by the number of patients coming to see him on the last day before his surgery closes. programme.title: Doc Martin

programme.sub-title: Final: Atletico Madrid v Real Sociedad
programme.desc: Coverage of the 124th Copa del Rey Final comes from Seville, where Atletico Madrid face Real Sociedad in Spains showpiece domestic cup final. programme.desc: After a civil war leaves the universe in ruins, the last starship captain, Dylan Hunt, and a group of mercenaries set out to restore peace and order to the Commonwealth.

programme.title: The Fall Guy
programme.desc: Colt discovers that $3 million in stolen pearls is hidden in three cars he bought for stunt use. Former TV crime-stoppers William Conrad, Mike Connors and Barry Newman help solve the case.

programme.title: Maximum Risk
programme.desc: High-octane action thriller about a retired French soldiers search for his twin brothers killers. Unaware that he even had a twin until he found him dead on the streets of his home town, the policeman vows not only to avenge the murder, but also to uncover the truth about his own past. The trail soon leads him to a Russian syndicate based in New York.

programme.title: Acts of Violence
programme.desc: Three Midwestern brothers, a crime lord, and an incorruptible police officer are on a deadly collision course when the youngest brothers fiancee is kidnapped by human traffickers. To save her, the MacGregor boys call on their military training and the strength of family to fight the most important battle of their lives.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Assigned to keep a secret missile-guidance system out of foreign hands, Steve must confront a robot constructed to kill.

Unfortunately for her assailants, she survives and soon begins a relentless quest for bloody revenge.

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the competition is to the House of Agnes in Canterbury, run by ex-hotel inspector Sandie De Rougemont. With her guests now fully aware of her past career, could the bombshell backfire on the self-proclaimed `BandB Buddha?

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: First to test the Repair Shops technical prowess, Julianna Smith from Milton Keynes. She is hoping Mark Stuckeys mastery of electronics can bring a radio system, handmade by her late father, back to life. Julianna remembers the radiogram filling the house with rock and roll music as a child. Her dear father, Patrick, was a clever chap and this creation, built from scratch, was his pride and joy. With no instruction manual for this unique item, Mark takes a slow and steady approach.

programme.desc: When homicide investigators meet crime writers, it transpires that real-life stories are often stranger than fiction.

programme.desc: A look into the world of forensic science and its use in criminal investigations. From microscopic DNA to ballistics, to hair and fibres.

programme.desc: When an eight-year-old girl disappears from her neighbourhood, citizens and police search the region to find her and her abductor.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: An investigation into the US bank heist in 1997 in which two armed men opened fire on staff and police officers at close range.

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.sub-title: Michelle Stewart; John Wilson; Helen Hill
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Michelle Stewarts first relationship came to an end, she was looking forward to moving on and exploring the exciting opportunities that lay ahead. But ex-boyfriend John Wilson had other ideas, failing to accept the break-up. He wanted to make sure that if he couldnt have Michelle, nor could anyone else. When young mum Helen Hills husband didnt come home after a night out, panic set in, but nothing could have prepared her for the truth behind his absence.

programme.title: Betrayed
programme.desc: Rhonda Smith is a single woman who relies on the kindness of strangers at her new church, then one of them betrays her.

programme.title: On the Case with Paula Zahn
programme.desc: A look at a witness account that could lead a small-town police department in the wrong direction as they try to solve the murder of their friend.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: An escaped inmate murders Debra Johnson, a highly respected Correctional Administrator, at her home outside the prison. With the public at risk, police scour through surveillance footage for clues to hunt him down before he strikes again.

programme.title: A Killers Mistake
programme.desc: A look at how detectives nailed wife-killer Nat Fraser, revealing how the scheming murderer botched the seemingly perfect plot.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Tammy Gardner loves being a mum and running a daycare out of her suburban Delaware home; she also loves a night out on the town; what starts as innocent fun leads this 40-year-old down a dark path of jealousy and deadly rage.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Police officer Albert Pacheco and his wife Cathy live Hawaiis Big Island, raising four kids in the bosom of their close-knit church community; what looks like a household steeped in traditional goodness is hiding something evil.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories

programme.title: Betrayed

programme.title: Final 24
programme.desc: Its 12 June 1994, and vibrant, funny, beautiful Nicole Brown Simpson appears to have it all. Rich, with a great body and two adorable children, the ex-wife of football legend OJ Simpson is living the Hollywood dream. In 24 hours, though, the dream will be brutally shattered, as Nicole will be dead and her ex-husband will stand accused in the murder trial of the century.

programme.title: Final 24
programme.desc: 18 April 1993, and one of the most notorious religious leaders in the United States, David Koresh, along with 83 of his followers, has been trapped inside a Waco, Texas, compound for over 50 days, unwilling to surrender and surrounded by the police authorities. The siege is the longest modern-day standoff in American law enforcement history. In 24 hours, however, it will all be over, and Koresh and 73 others will be dead.

programme.title: The Manson Murders
programme.desc: The Manson Family, led by Charles Manson, committed a set of crimes that terrified the world and brought the flower power movement to a halt. Charles Milles Manson was an American criminal and musician who led the Manson Family, a cult based in California.

programme.title: Killed Walking Home
programme.desc: Every three days, a woman is killed in the UK. These women could be sisters, daughters and friends. Although there is a lead that breaks open the case, what comes in light of the investigation is one that leaves an everlasting scar on the families.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.sub-title: Death of a Mail Order Bride
programme.desc: A mother disappears after she drops her children off with her ex-husband. He evades police and is found with thousands of dollars and his passport.

programme.title: Catch My Killer
programme.desc: Connie Hevener and Carolyn Hevener Perry are brutally killed while working at an ice cream shop.

programme.title: Catch My Killer
programme.desc: Donna Fowlers disappearance isnt her first, but its her last. Years later, Stacy Belcher vanishes too. Two families face the horror of a long-time monster.

programme.title: Catch My Killer
programme.desc: When Marlene Major disappears in 1980, her family suspects she ran off to escape her abusive husband. Her daughter is determined to learn the truth and seek justice for her mother.

programme.title: Catch My Killer
programme.desc: Marilyn Kananen has vanished and her children are afraid that their abusive father has returned.

programme.title: Catch My Killer
programme.desc: Two years after a 13-year-old girl was taken from her home, her skull is found.

programme.title: Catch My Killer
programme.desc: A missing girl, 16, is found dead.

programme.title: Moochie: Who Killed Jill Halliburton?
programme.desc: Jill Halliburton is murdered and police arrest a black man nicknamed Moochie. However, the testimony of the victims son raises questions. Distressing scenes.

programme.title: Moochie: Who Killed Jill Halliburton?
programme.desc: Following Moochies escape, the police organise a massive manhunt as supporters of the fugitive amongst the Black community make their voice heard.

programme.title: Moochie: Who Killed Jill Halliburton?
programme.desc: Crystal is arrested by the police and new charges are added to Moochies file. These new elements cast doubt on his sincerity.

programme.title: Moochie: Who Killed Jill Halliburton?
programme.desc: The defence investigation reveals inconsistencies in the testimony of Nan-Yao, the victims husband. Did he lie to the police? Could he be guilty?

programme.title: Moochie: Who Killed Jill Halliburton?
programme.desc: Moochies trial begins. Even if the defences role is not to solve the case, they will have to prove Moochies innocence. Do they have enough evidence to do so?

programme.title: Moochie: Who Killed Jill Halliburton?
programme.desc: Following the cancellation of the first trial, the second begins. The defence seems to have changed its strategy. Will this new jury acquit Moochie?

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: Headlines are made for the sexual assault and murder of a British student in Italy. Housemate Amanda Knox and her boyfriend are suspected. Find out if prosecutors can keep them behind bars.

programme.title: You Belong to Me: Sex, Race and Murder in the South
programme.desc: In 1952, a prominent black woman killed a white doctor in Florida after suffering years of sexual abuse at his hands. Despite abundant evidence that she was acting in self-defence, a jury found her guilty and sentenced her to death.

programme.title: Surviving Sinaga
programme.desc: Reynhard Sinaga is the UKs most prolific rapist. Meeting men outside Manchester nightclubs, he drugged, sexually assaulted and filmed his depraved acts with at least 200 young men for the past 12 years. Featuring interviews with those affected.

programme.title: Served: Harvey Weinstein
programme.desc: The rise and fall of one of Hollywoods most powerful men, Harvey Weinstein.

programme.title: Private Violence
programme.desc: Filmmaker Cynthia Hill examines the case of Deanna Walters, a survivor of spousal abuse who embarks on a crusade for justice.

programme.title: Andre Rieu: La Vie Est Belle
programme.desc: Dutch violinist Andre Rieu brings his orchestra to an atmospheric Berlin amphitheatre, with musical favourites like Ravels Bolero, Laras Theme from `Doctor Zhivago and Auld Lang Syne.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: An employee successfully manages to defraud his company, but then an accountant discovers his secret.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Tired of gloves vanishing from his factory, Ralph hires a detective. Then, when he tells his wife about the thefts, gloves start appearing in unexpected places.

programme.title: The Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: The story of Maria Vargas, a Spanish peasant who, thanks to her beauty, rocketed to fame as a movie star. Told in flashback at her funeral, film director Harry Dawes recalls discovering her, PR Oscar Muldoon remembers how she was wooed and then abandoned by Alberto Bravano, and her husband Count Vincenzo Torlato-Favrini recounts how his world crumbled after he revealed a secret.

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: To be a Hollywood legend is to fly too close to the sun, to embody the dreams of millions while placing your fate in their hearts. This programme celebrates the lives of those who soared the highest.

programme.title: Portrait Artist of the Year
programme.desc: Who is the best portrait artist in the UK and Ireland? Thats the question that this programme tries to answer. The show, with its judging panel, travels to London, Glasgow, Dublin and Cardiff to hold competitions to find each citys top portrait artist. Those four artists then travel to Paris for further inspiration and development, producing one further work during their two days in Frances capital city. The four finalists work is then displayed in Londons National Portrait Gallery for a period. In addition to being considered for further projects by the gallery, the winner is awarded a £10,000 commission to produce a portrait of author Hilary Mantel that will become part of The British Librarys permanent art collection.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Does Linda have an ulterior motive in befriending Karen?

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.sub-title: What Have You Been Up to Lately?
programme.desc: Two failed actors, whose marriages are also washed up, meet for the first time in years. It turns out to be a meeting that leads to tragedy for both.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A lawyer, with blackmail in mind, meets with a famed prosecutor to prove he convicted an innocent man.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A convicted robber stays with the family of his cellmate after his release from prison, against the better judgement of his parole officer.

programme.title: Guy Garvey: From The Vaults
programme.desc: Elbow frontman Guy Garvey returns for series four as he walks through more era-defining musical performances, long lost studio appearances and interviews.

programme.title: Muddy Waters and the Rolling Stones: Live at the Checkerboard Lounge
programme.desc: On 22 November 1981, in the middle of their mammoth American tour, the Rolling Stones arrived in Chicago prior to playing three nights at the Rosemont Horizon. Long influenced by the Chicago blues, the band went to Buddy Guys club to see the legendary Muddy Waters perform. This unique occasion was captured on camera and has now been restored from the original footage.

programme.title: The Rolling Stones - Stones In Exile
programme.desc: The story of the exuberant period of scandal and creativity behind The Rolling Stones 1972 album Exile on Main Street, as the band lived a life of excess after fleeing to the French Riviera to avoid huge tax bills in the UK.

programme.title: Johnson and Knopflers Music Legends
programme.desc: Brian and Mark travel to California to visit Carlos Santana, who recounts his incredible journey in music, from his early days through his Woodstock performance and resurgence in the late 90s. Together, they jam an amazing version of `Black Magic Woman, and Carlos plays some of his biggest hits.

programme.title: Isle Of Wight Festival 2023 (Highlights)
programme.desc: Highlights of the Isle of Wight Festival, which this year featured headline sets from Pulp, George Ezra, The Chemical Brothers and Robbie Williams.

programme.title: Women Who Rock
programme.desc: As questions of authenticity, control, and feminism arise in the 90s, Sheryl Crow, Missy Elliott, Courtney Love, Tori Amos, and Alanis Morissette make music on their own terms.

programme.title: Women Who Rock

programme.title: Kate Bush, the Timeless Genius
programme.desc: Kate Bush broke new ground in pop music with her poetic and radical otherness. Looking back at her career, giving a voice not only to the musician herself, but also to all those she continues to inspire today.

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: To clear his criminal record a former LA cop must infiltrate the Miami street-racing scene to set up a drug baron. Burning rubber all over the city with his ex-con friend, he attempts to deliver the crook to the FBI without crashing and being blown to pieces in one of the many explosions.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: Primatologist Davis Okoye shares an unshakable bond with George, an extraordinarily intelligent silverback gorilla thats been in his care since birth. When a genetic experiment goes wrong, it causes George, a wolf and a reptile to grow to a monstrous size. As the mutated beasts embark on a path of destruction, Okoye teams up with a discredited genetic engineer and the military to secure an antidote and prevent a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen
programme.desc: Mikaela and Sam once again join forces with Optimus Prime again to save Earth from ruthless robot The Fallen.

programme.title: Morbius
programme.desc: Biochemist Michael Morbius tries to cure himself of a rare blood disease, but when his experiment goes wrong, he inadvertently infects himself with a form of vampirism instead.

programme.title: Shazam!
programme.desc: Billy Batson is a streetwise 14-year-old who can magically transform into the adult superhero Shazam simply by shouting out one word. His newfound powers soon get put to the test when he squares off against the evil Dr. Thaddeus Sivana.

programme.title: Batman Forever
programme.desc: DA Harvey Dent and vengeful scientist The Riddler plan to take down Batman, as Dent wrongly believes that it is Batmans fault he was disfigured, and the scientist is angry with Bruce Wayne for rejecting his experiments. The Gotham City superhero is going to need his new partner, boy wonder Robin, but will he be able to cope with the distraction of sexy doctor Chase Meridian?

programme.title: Fast and Furious Presents: Hobbs and Shaw
programme.desc: Brixton Lorr is a cybernetically enhanced soldier who possesses superhuman strength, a brilliant mind and a lethal pathogen that could wipe out half of the worlds population. Its now up to hulking lawman Luke Hobbs and lawless operative Deckard Shaw to put aside their past differences and work together to prevent the seemingly indestructible Lorr from destroying humanity.

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: To clear his criminal record a former LA cop must infiltrate the Miami street-racing scene to set up a drug baron. Burning rubber all over the city with his ex-con friend, he attempts to deliver the crook to the FBI without crashing and being blown to pieces in one of the many explosions.

programme.title: Aquaman

programme.title: Fast and Furious 5
programme.desc: In Rio de Janeiro, ex-con Dom Torretto and ex-cop Brian OConner join forces against a corrupt businessman who wants them both dead.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen
programme.desc: Mikaela and Sam once again join forces with Optimus Prime again to save Earth from ruthless robot The Fallen.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: Street-racing sequel following an adrenaline-junkie automobile addict who narrowly avoids jail by agreeing to move in with his father in Tokyo. However, he soon discovers the thrill of the local underground drift racing scene and unwittingly becomes involved with the Yakuza.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: Street-racing sequel following an adrenaline-junkie automobile addict who narrowly avoids jail by agreeing to move in with his father in Tokyo. However, he soon discovers the thrill of the local underground drift racing scene and unwittingly becomes involved with the Yakuza.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie 2
programme.desc: Red, Chuck, Bomb and the rest of their feathered friends are surprised when a green pig suggests that they put aside their differences and unite to fight a common threat. Aggressive birds from an island covered in ice are planning to use an elaborate weapon to destroy the fowl and swine way of life. After picking their best and brightest, the birds and pigs come up with a scheme to infiltrate the island, deactivate the device and return to their respective paradises intact.

programme.title: Rock Dog
programme.desc: Hoping to become a famous musician, a young Tibetan Mastiff leaves home to find a legendary and reclusive music artist, setting off a series of unexpected events.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: Flightless birds lead a mostly happy existence, except for Red, who just cant get past the daily annoyances of life. His temperament leads him to anger management class, where he meets fellow misfits Chuck and Bomb. Red becomes even more agitated when his feathered brethren welcome green pigs to their island paradise. As the swine begin to get under his skin, Red joins forces with Chuck and Bomb to investigate the real reason behind their mysterious arrival.

programme.title: Trolls
programme.desc: Poppy, the optimistic leader of the trolls, and Branch, her polar opposite, embark on an adventure that takes them far beyond the only world theyve ever known.

programme.title: Super-Charlie
programme.desc: A young boy attempts to solve an ongoing series of crimes with the help of his super-powered baby brother.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 3: A Monster Vacation
programme.desc: Mavis surprises Dracula with plans for a fun-filled summer voyage on a monster cruise. As the pack starts enjoying colossal buffets and exotic excursions, Drac finds himself falling for the ships intriguing but dangerous captain. He soon learns that trying to balance family, friends and romance might just be too much to handle. even for the worlds most powerful vampire.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Shrek is just starting to settle down in his beloved swamp with his wife Fiona, but their mucky bliss doesnt last for long as word arrives that the ogres froggy father-in-law is about to croak. The very last thing Shrek wants is to become King, but with no other heir in sight, it looks like the grumpy green one is destined never to live quietly in the swamp again. A glimmer of hope appears in the form of heir Artie.

programme.title: Small Foot
programme.desc: Migo is a friendly Yeti who discovers something that he didnt know existed: a human. When his fellow villagers refuse to believe him, Migo embarks on an epic journey to find the mysterious creature that can put him back in good graces.

programme.title: Shark Tale
programme.desc: A fast-talking fish gains fame after taking credit for the accidental death of a shark mobster. While enjoying the popularity at first, his tall tale starts to unravel as others begin to suspect that he is not the Defender of the Reef after all, and when the sharks enemies get involved, his lies lead him into dangerous waters. A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: 10 Lives
programme.desc: A pampered cat takes for granted the lucky hand he has been dealt after he is rescued and loved by Rose, a kind-hearted and passionate student. When he loses his ninth life, fate steps in to set him on a transformative journey.

programme.title: Super-Charlie
programme.desc: A young boy attempts to solve an ongoing series of crimes with the help of his super-powered baby brother.

programme.title: Rock Dog
programme.desc: Hoping to become a famous musician, a young Tibetan Mastiff leaves home to find a legendary and reclusive music artist, setting off a series of unexpected events.

programme.title: Tim Burtons Corpse Bride
programme.desc: Anxious not to make a mistake in his wedding ceremony, Victor goes to the woods to practise his vows. Unfortunately, he slides the ring onto the twig-finger of a long-dead bride who has been waiting years for a suitor.

programme.title: Scary Girl
programme.desc: To save her father from a dangerous scientist in a world shrouded in darkness, and prevent her planets destruction, a young girl overcomes her fears to travel to a mysterious city of light.

programme.title: Paws of Fury: The Legend of Hank
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck hound finds himself in a town full of cats who need a hero to defend them from a ruthless villains evil plot. With help from a reluctant trainer, the underdog must assume the role of fearsome samurai and save the day.

programme.title: Paws of Fury: The Legend of Hank
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck hound finds himself in a town full of cats who need a hero to defend them from a ruthless villains evil plot. With help from a reluctant trainer, the underdog must assume the role of fearsome samurai and save the day.

programme.title: Sausage Party
programme.desc: Supermarket perishables devise a plan to escape from their human enemies after Frank the sausage learns that they will eventually become meals.

programme.title: Hope Springs
programme.desc: A woman drags her skeptical husband to a renowned counsellors marriage retreat to try to put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: Blades of Glory
programme.desc: Chazz Michael Michaels and Jimmy MacElroy are the two titans of skating. At the Winter Olympics, the fierce rivals find themselves forced to share the winners podium when they both score gold. The shower of glory doesnt last for long, as the pair descend into fisticuffs and set the mascot on fire. Disgraced and stripped of their medals, they can get back on ice, but only if they dance with each other as a pair.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: An ambitious law graduate decides to leave her job as she feels her skills are not appreciated by her boss, who basically treats her like his PA. However, he wont let her go that easily.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Set on a Greek island, a young woman who is about to be married suspects that any one of three men could be her father. She invites them all to her wedding without telling her mother. Movie adaptation of the musical, set to Abbas greatest hits.

programme.title: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
programme.desc: In 1979 Donna falls in love with Sam while embarking on a series of adventures throughout Europe. In the present day, Donnas pregnant daughter reunites with her mothers old friends and boyfriends on the Greek island of Kalokairi.

programme.title: The School of Rock
programme.desc: After guitarist Dewey is kicked out of his own band, he pretends to be a teacher. When he hears the kids play, he realises they could be his support group in the Battle of the Bands, and hell finally get to be the rock star he knows hes destined to be.

programme.title: The Intern
programme.desc: Ben Whittaker, a retired widower in his 70s becomes senior intern at a fashion based e-commerce company. Jules Ostin, the founder, while first hesitant, soon learns to respect and even like her new intern despite their age difference.

programme.title: Talladega Nights: The Ballad of Ricky Bobby
programme.desc: A champion NASCAR drivers cosy position alongside his best friend at the top of the championship is threatened by a flamboyant French newcomer. With his confidence shattered, the driver draws on the help of his father and some eccentric training techniques to claw his way back to the top.

programme.title: Dumb and Dumber
programme.desc: A pair of idiotic friends set off on a madcap journey to return a briefcase to its owner. However, they are blissfully unaware that the case contains a large amount of ransom money for the owners kidnapped husband. Their trip is soon fraught with disaster, especially when the kidnappers begin to pursue them across the country with the aim of grabbing the cash.

programme.title: American Pie
programme.desc: Believing it essential before they go to college, four teenage boys vow to lose their virginity and enter into a pact, each attempting to be the first to do the deed as their efforts are met with varying levels of success and failure.

programme.title: American Pie 2
programme.desc: Action-packed sequel in which a group of friends are reunited after their freshman year of college and embark upon a series of comical adventures when they rent a summer house on Lake Michigan.

programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad!
programme.desc: Hard-boiled incompetent cop Frank Drebin must stop the evil Vincent Ludwig from completing his diabolical plan of killing Elizabeth II.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear
programme.desc: Lt Frank Debrin uncovers a plot by the polluting energy giants to de-rail ecological plans that could render their products redundant. Theyre led by the evil Quentin Hapsburg who, to make matters worse, is romancing Franks ex, Jane Spencer.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear
programme.desc: Lt Frank Debrin uncovers a plot by the polluting energy giants to de-rail ecological plans that could render their products redundant. Theyre led by the evil Quentin Hapsburg who, to make matters worse, is romancing Franks ex, Jane Spencer.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult
programme.desc: Clueless cop Frank Drebin is hauled out of retirement to save the Oscars ceremony from mad bombers. Anna Nicole Smith provides support in this comic sequel.

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: Anora, a sex worker from Brooklyn, gets her chance at a Cinderella story when she meets and marries the son of an oligarch. Once the news reaches Russia, her fairytale is threatened as the parents set out for New York to get the marriage annulled.

programme.title: Turtles All the Way Down
programme.desc: When a 16-year-old struggling with obsessive-compulsive disorder reconnects with her childhood crush, she faces the potential of finding love and happiness despite her mental condition.

programme.title: Beach Rats
programme.desc: An aimless teen in Brooklyn, NY, spends the summer with his delinquent buddies, a potential new girlfriend and older men that he meets online.

programme.title: Boyz N the Hood
programme.desc: John Singletons portrait of black youths struggling to survive the poverty and violence of urban Los Angeles. It follows three youths as they confront the reality of life in South Central.

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: Given one last shot at glory, a former boxing champion has just six days to make weight for a title fight. His obsession soon leaves him at the mercy of a notorious trainer who takes every last ounce from his mind, body and soul.

programme.title: Darkest Hour
programme.desc: With the German Army now just across the Channel, newly-appointed Prime Minister Winston Churchill must decide between negotiating a peace treaty with Hitler or standing firm. With the King, the public and his own political party all questioning his wisdom, the hard-drinking Churchill has to survive his own darkest hour and rally the country behind him.

programme.title: About a Boy
programme.desc: Parallel coming-of-age stories of a layabout `serial nice guy living a posh, carefree lifestyle off his deceased fathers fortune, and a bright but awkward youth whos tired of his mothers depressed, boyfriend-less state. Their paths collide when the boy fabricates a two-year-old son and joins a group called S.P.A.T. (Single Parents Alone Together).

programme.title: Jackie
programme.desc: The days leading up to the tragedy of President John F. Kennedys assassination and its immediate aftermath are chronicled as they were experienced by the First Lady, wife of the charismatic president and mother of two small children.

programme.title: Lost in Translation
programme.desc: In Tokyo shooting a whisky commercial, middle-aged actor Bob Harris becomes attracted to Charlotte, the young wife of a celebrity photographer. Together they ride out their boredom of hotel life and their bewilderment of the city.

programme.title: Darkest Hour
programme.desc: With the German Army now just across the Channel, newly-appointed Prime Minister Winston Churchill must decide between negotiating a peace treaty with Hitler or standing firm. With the King, the public and his own political party all questioning his wisdom, the hard-drinking Churchill has to survive his own darkest hour and rally the country behind him.

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom falls for a charming neurosurgeon after she moves to Boston to chase her dream of opening her own business. However, when her first love suddenly reenters her life, her relationship gets upended, leaving her with an impossible choice.

programme.title: Valentines Day
programme.desc: Following a group of Los Angeles residents who try to find their way through the highs and lows of love during a single day.

programme.title: Black Dog
programme.desc: Two teenage boys from very different London backgrounds embark on a road trip North together. As they start to open up about their pasts, the boys learn they have far more in common than they first thought.

programme.title: Black Dog
programme.desc: Two teenage boys from very different London backgrounds embark on a road trip North together. As they start to open up about their pasts, the boys learn they have far more in common than they first thought.

programme.title: Jungleland
programme.desc: A reluctant bare-knuckle boxer and his manager brother must travel across the country for one last fight, but an unexpected travel companion exposes the cracks in their bond along the way.

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: The Island of Lost Dreams
programme.desc: The sequel in which the globetrotting sibling duo attempt to reclaim the powerful Transmooker device from the clutches of a mad scientist. Their quest leads them to his tropical island hideaway, which he shares with an assortment of mutant creatures.

programme.title: Spy Kids 3: Game Over
programme.desc: The Spy Kids set off on their third adventure. Secret Agent Carmen finds herself trapped in a 3-D virtual reality video game designed by their new arch nemesis, the Toymaker. Juni must save his sister, as they battle it out against lifelike 3-D monsters, completing each progressively harder level and ultimately trying to save the youth of the world.

programme.title: Peter Pan
programme.desc: In stifling Edwardian London, Wendy Darling mesmerises her brothers every night with bedtime tales of swordplay, swashbuckling and the fearsome Captain Hook. However, the children become the heroes of an even greater story, when Peter Pan flies into their nursery one night and leads them over moonlit rooftops through a galaxy of stars and to the lush jungles of Neverland.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: A young Peruvian bear with a passion for all things British travels to London in search of a home. Finding himself lost and alone at Paddington Station, he begins to realise that city life is not all he had imagined - until he meets the kindly Brown family, who offer him a temporary haven.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Settled in with the Brown family, Paddington the bear is a popular member of the community who spreads joy and marmalade wherever he goes. One fine day, he spots a pop-up book in an antique shop: the perfect present for his beloved aunts 100th birthday. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before Aunt Lucys big celebration.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Two fathers get laid off from their well-paid jobs and are forced to stay at home to look after their kids. Seeing the opportunity to make money, the two of them open their own day-care centre. With very little experience and some fairly unconventional ideas on child care, can they really hope to compete against the prim and proper Chapman Academy, which has monopolised the child care industry in their town?

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies
programme.desc: After the dwarves find and awaken Smaug the dragon, a battle arises to gain control of Erebor and the vast treasure inside. Meanwhile, Bilbo Baggins is in possession of a mysterious and magical ring.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A magic portal transports the little blue people to Manhattan, where they must find a way back to their village before evil wizard Gargamel can find them.

programme.title: The Smurfs 2
programme.desc: Papa and the rest of the Smurfs reunite with their human friends to rescue Smurfette from the clutches of evil wizard Gargamel.

programme.title: Wallace and Gromit in The Curse of the Were-Rabbit
programme.desc: The village is being overrun by rabbits and Wallace has a plan to alter their minds so that they will leave the vegetable allotments alone. However, his plan goes awry and the rabbit problem escalates when the villagers discover a monstrous `were-rabbit destroying everything in its sights. Will Wallace and Gromit be able to solve the conundrum before the creature gets shot?

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: An international hit man and quick-change artist is hired by a secret organisation to assassinate Charles de Gaulle.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: A young lawyer joins a small but prestigious law firm only to find out that most of their clients are on the wrong side of the law. The company is helping to launder mob money, get clients off charges and even murder partners who threaten to blow their cover, but when the FBI come calling to gather evidence on the lawyers colleagues, he is caught between a rock and a hard place, juggling his life and his liberty.

programme.title: Patriot Games
programme.desc: While visiting London with his family, Jack Ryan foils an IRA attempt to assassinate a government minister, killing one of the attackers in the process. Swearing vengeance, the IRAs Sean Miller follows Ryan and his family to their seaside home in America where he and his followers plan to exact their revenge.

programme.title: Dirty Harry
programme.desc: A violent and uncompromising police officer hunts for a psychopath who holds the city of San Francisco to ransom. Although the officers unorthodox methods do not endear him to his superiors, the mayor reluctantly agrees that Harry Callahan seems to be the right cop for the job.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: Scary chiller about a coastal community plagued by a killer shark. With the summer tourist season at hand, the mayor is keen to keep the first attack hushed up. However, when an expert claims that the attacks are the work of a giant great white shark, there is only one solution - to kill the monster fish before it can feed again.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Another great white shark arrives to terrorise the holiday resort of Amity Island. Having recovered from the grisly events of four years ago, the island is once again packed with tourists. Families are sailing in the bay and swimming off the beach, but when two divers and a water-skier go missing, the local police chief fears that he is about to relive his greatest nightmare.

programme.title: Jaws III
programme.desc: Second sequel to Steven Spielbergs 1970s blockbuster transports the action from Amity Island to a new undersea kingdom attraction in a Florida theme park. The capture of a baby great white shark is big news and brings crowds to the park - until its mother arrives on the scene.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: The curse of an ancient mummy protects buried treasure in the Egyptian desert. An American mercenary who knows of the secret location is rescued from a Cairo prison by an English historian and her brother, and together they set off on a hunt. Along the way, the trio encounter flesh-eating scarab beetles, killer sandstorms, and reincarnated demons.

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: In an attempt to avenge the violent death of his parents, Bruce Wayne fights to rid the city of crime and in particular, his nemesis the Joker. However, his defences come down when an attractive journalist tries to track down the truth behind sightings of a huge bat-like figure in the sky.

programme.title: Batman Returns
programme.desc: After Selina Kyle sees more than she should in her bosss office, she has an `accident, falling from the top floor of the building to the street below. Awoken by the licking of cats, she is surprised to find herself still very much alive. She vows to take revenge on her boss and becomes a female avenger, defending women under attack and providing assistance to Batmans efforts to keep the streets of Gotham safe.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A glamorous career woman loses control when her married lover, a Manhattan attorney, ends their brief affair. Unable to accept his rejection, she pursues him at the office, and then at his home, eventually drawing his wife and daughter into the confrontation.

programme.title: A Clockwork Orange
programme.desc: In an England of the future, Alex de Large is the leader of a gang of droogs whose pastime is violence, sex and murder, but whose eventual punishment is almost as extreme and violent as his crimes. Betrayed by the other members of his gang, he is arrested and offered an experimental treatment in order to shorten his sentence.

programme.title: A Clockwork Orange
programme.desc: In an England of the future, Alex de Large is the leader of a gang of droogs whose pastime is violence, sex and murder, but whose eventual punishment is almost as extreme and violent as his crimes. Betrayed by the other members of his gang, he is arrested and offered an experimental treatment in order to shorten his sentence.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: After moving to China, twelve-year-old Dre Parker falls in love with his classmate Mei Ying. This soon comes to the attention of the class bully, Cheng.

programme.title: Karate Kid: Legends
programme.desc: After moving to New York City, kung fu prodigy Li Fong enters a karate competition -- but his skills alone arent enough. With help from Mr. Han and Daniel LaRusso, he soon learns to merge two styles into one for the ultimate martial arts showdown.

programme.title: Zombieland
programme.desc: Columbus and Tallahassee have orchestrated a way to survive a world overrun by zombies. With only fear keeping the `big wuss Columbus alive, Tallahassee wants to eradicate the `last Twinkie on Earth. The duo join forces with Wichita and Little Rock who have a style and tact of their own when it comes to dealing with the flesh-eating chaos.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: Under the watchful eye of mentor Tony Stark, high school student Peter Parker starts to embrace his newfound identity as Spider-Man. When the evil Vulture emerges to cause havoc, everything Peter loves is in jeopardy.

programme.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
programme.desc: Spider-Mans identity is revealed to everyone, and he can no longer separate his normal life from his superhero life. When he asks Doctor Strange for help, it forces him to discover what it means to be him.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
programme.desc: Peter Parker finds a clue that might help him understand why his parents disappeared when he was young. His path puts him on a collision course with Dr. Curt Connors, his fathers former partner.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: The emergence of a powerful new villain and the return of an old friend bring Peter Parker to the realization that all his enemies have one thing in common: Oscorp. Based on Marvel Comics characters.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Weather scientists Jo and Bill put marital problems aside to track a slew of devastating tornadoes raging through Oklahoma and stay one step ahead of their better-equipped but arrogant rivals. They have to get to the tornado first to be able to test a radical new device, by inserting it directly into the heart of the storm.

programme.title: Twisters
programme.desc: Competing teams of storm chasers find themselves in a fight for their lives as multiple systems converge over central Oklahoma.

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2

programme.title: On Swift Horses
programme.desc: Muriel and her husband, Lee, begin a new life together after he returns home from the Korean War. However, their newfound stability gets upended by the arrival of Lees charismatic brother, a wayward gambler with a secret past.

programme.title: A Big Bold Beautiful Journey
programme.desc: Through a surprising twist of fate, single strangers Sarah and David get to relive important moments from their respective pasts, illuminating how they got to where they are in the present.

programme.title: Roofman
programme.desc: Escaped convict Jeffrey Manchester hides out in a Toys "R" Us, surviving undetected for months while planning his next move. However, his double life starts to unravel when he falls for a divorced mum, setting off a compelling game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Final Destination Bloodlines
programme.desc: Plagued by a violent and recurring nightmare, a college student heads home to track down the one person who might be able to break the cycle of death and save her family from the grisly demise that inevitably awaits them all.

programme.title: Blue Moon
programme.desc: In 1943 lyricist Lorenz Hart confronts his shattered self-confidence in a bar as his former collaborator, Richard Rodgers, celebrates the opening night of his groundbreaking hit musical "Oklahoma!"

programme.title: Black Dog
programme.desc: Released from jail, Lang returns to his hometown in Northwest China. As part of a dog patrol tasked with clearing stray dogs before the 2008 Olympics, he bonds with a black stray. The two lonely souls embark on a new journey together.

programme.title: Eye in the Sky
programme.desc: A lieutenant general and a colonel face political opposition after ordering a drone missile strike to take out a group of suicide bombers in Nairobi, Kenya.

programme.title: Bumblebee
programme.desc: On the run in the year 1987, Bumblebee the Autobot finds refuge in a junkyard in a small California beach town. When 17-year-old Charlie revives him, she quickly learns that this is no ordinary yellow Volkswagen.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Supernatural comedy about three New York parapsychology professors who decide to set up a ghost-catching agency. Soon a storm of malevolent spirits threatens to destroy the city, and the mysterious contents of a womans fridge suggest a paranormal Armageddon.

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of paranoia, surviving off-grid with his daughter, Willa. When his nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her while battling the consequences of his past.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Epic tale in which an intrepid archaeologist tries to beat a band of Nazis to a unique religious relic which is central to their plans for world domination. Battling against a snake phobia and a vengeful ex-girlfriend, Indiana Jones is in constant peril, making hairs-breadth escapes at every turn in this celebration of the innocent adventure movies of an earlier era.

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: Adaptation of the adventures of the swinging comic-strip hero. A shy student becomes a crime fighter after a bite from a mutant spider, during a school outing, gives him extraordinary powers. As he comes to terms with his new-found abilities, he is also forced to contend with a maniac villain known as the Green Goblin.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: The comic book web-slinger returns for a blockbusting sequel. Crime-fighting has cost Peter Parker his best friend and his true love Mary Jane. However, just as he quits as Spider-Man, New York comes under threat from Dr Octopus, a metal-tentacled madman. Peter has no choice but to swing back into action.

programme.title: Spider-Man 3
programme.desc: Life is sweet for Peter Parker, MJ loves him, her career is taking off and Spidey-mania is sweeping New York. However, when an alien parasite bonds to his suit, its not long before the good times and Spidey turn bad. While his ugly ego is taking centre stage, MJ is dumped from her Broadway show, Harry remembers Spider-Mans role in his fathers death, and Peter is consumed by revenge.

The gangland empire they build is characterised by violence and intimidation, and the film is unflinching in its depiction of their rise to power.

programme.title: The Stranger in My Home
programme.desc: Ali meets a mysterious man who claims to be the father of her teenage daughter, Katie. What begins as an unsettling encounter soon spirals into a nightmare of long-buried secrets, lies and obsession.

programme.desc: Nothing in Cassies life is what it appears to be, shes wickedly smart, tantalisingly cunning, and shes living a secret double life by night. Now, an unexpected encounter is about to give Cassie a chance to right the wrongs from the past.

programme.title: Three Days of the Condor
programme.desc: A bookish library clerk working for a CIA front is hunted after he stumbles across a covert intelligence operation. Returning from lunch, he finds the entire office massacred. Using his codename Condor, he contacts the CIA, but when an agent tries to kill him, he kidnaps a stranger off the street to ensure his survival and attempts to turn the tables on those who want him dead.

programme.title: Trap

programme.title: The Equalizer

programme.title: Icons

programme.title: Football Heroes

programme.title: The Hotel
programme.desc: Checking in to the Damson Dene are Richard and Rebecca from Manchester, who have two young babies and havent spent a night on their own for 14 months. Richards just turned 30, and when Rebecca asked him what he wanted for his birthday, he said "a nights sleep". Also visiting the Damson Dene are Simon, an engineer for the Royal Navy, and his Brazilian girlfriend Vanusa, whom he met while on a naval posting oversea.

programme.title: Irish Railways

programme.title: The Yorkshire Steam Railway: All Aboard
programme.desc: August Bank Holiday brings sun, and lots of people to the line.

programme.title: Secret Allied Aircraft of WWII
programme.desc: Explore the way in which British and American aircraft designers were able to close the gap with the technologically more advanced German and Japanese aircraft of the Second World War.

programme.title: WWII POWs: Long March
programme.desc: Veterans reveal the real reasons they joined the fighting forces. They tell of inadequate training, of meeting the enemy, and the shocking realities of combat and capture. Ep1: Capture.

programme.title: Last Voices of World War I
programme.desc: The story of 1917 and the terrible battles at Arras and Passchendaele. Countless numbers drowned in mud during battles that remains synonymous with the horror of mechanised warfare.

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: Follow the evolution of aerial eavesdropping, from balloons to wooden bi-planes, and from the birth of photographic reconnaissance units to todays spy satellites.

programme.title: When the Boat Comes In
programme.sub-title: Look Up and See the Sky
programme.desc: The battle for Wellesley Street continues.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur and Terry get involved with a small-time crook who manages to steal a suitcase full of money. Arthur soon realises that the notes are suspect, but still manages to be out of pocket when the situation comes to a dramatic climax.

programme.title: Poldark
programme.desc: Lord Falmouth urges Ross to return to Westminster as Georges alliance with Adderley gives him the opportunity to purchase a borough of his own. A heartbroken Dwight tells Caroline that Sarah has a heart defect and their daughter dies shortly after.

programme.title: Ashes to Ashes
programme.desc: When animal rights activists threaten a series of attacks in London, placing the daughter of a laboratory owner in hospital, Gene orders his team not to sleep until those responsible are caught. Their investigation brings Alex face to face with a man whose eerily prescient knowledge of the future makes her think he could be involved with her own fate.

programme.title: Secret Scotland with Susan Calman
programme.desc: The jaw-dropping North Coast 500 is Scotlands answer to the iconic Route 66.

programme.title: Where Were You?
programme.desc: In March 1978, wild weather raged off the coast of France and hit the Amoco Cadiz, causing the worst oil spill at sea of its time. Sadly, it was not an isolated incident, as the Exxon Valdez disaster shows.

programme.title: Icons
programme.desc: An actor whose Hawaiian name means cool breeze over the mountain, Keanu Reeves is part English, Hawaiian and Chinese; born in Lebanon he is Inscrutable, handsome and very private.

programme.title: Britains Railways Then And Now: Southern Railway
programme.desc: Programme compares how things have changed on Southern Rail from early days until more recently; rare footage beginning of the Ashford works, which were an oasis of steam with three of Harry Wainwrights C class locomotives.

programme.title: Football Heroes
programme.desc: The Portuguese prodigy Cristiano Ronaldo, his career and achievements are investigated in todays show.

programme.title: The Hotel
programme.sub-title: Theres a Fly in My Soup
programme.desc: The Damson Dene comes under attack from guests complaining about everything from the decor to the food and the housekeeping, pushing manager Wayne and his staff to the brink. First to check in are mother and daughter Margaret and Sasha, who love value for money, making a point of seeking out bargain breaks. Theyve come to the Lake District to take advantage of the Damson Denes £50-a-night bed, breakfast and dinner deal.

programme.title: Irish Railways
programme.desc: We explore a further selection of films from Irish railway enthusiasts who set out in the early and mid 1960s to capture as much of the twilight of steam in Ulster in colour as they could.

programme.title: Jack The Ripper
programme.desc: This biography examines the Whitechapel crimes committed by a murderer who was never found. With new theories, and some old, on who he might have been, it includes shocking photographs, which have never been shown on television before.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Steam Railway: All Aboard
programme.desc: Its the annual War Weekend, and the events centrepiece, a WWII artillery gun, is putting up a fight.

programme.title: The Gathering Storm: Life In The War
programme.desc: In 1939, Britain was a global superpower. A year later, it was the frontline of a desperate struggle to survive. The coming of war transformed peoples lives. As pilots duelled in the skies above, the capital city prepared for the gathering storm.

programme.title: WWII POWs: Long March
programme.desc: Ex-Prisoners of War tell of their time in captivity. It is a story of stark contrasts, of everyday existence and clandestine diversions. And the terrors of forced labour. Ep2: Captivity.

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: University sweethearts Kirstie and Tom have recently bought a new build house in Daventry. They have been busy nest building and working on their homes interior, but now its their lacklustre garden that seriously needs attention. They would like their south-facing, characterless garden transformed into a curvy, naturalistic oasis with a spiritual, Dartmoor-inspired atmosphere.

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and the team present the makeover show, transforming unloved spaces into dream gardens for some very special people. In this episode, Alan and the team create a space-age garden in rural Cornwall for Chris Finney and his family. In 2003, Chris became the youngest serviceman ever to receive the George Cross, awarded for his extraordinary courage under fire, but since leaving the forces he has not always found civilian life easy.

programme.desc: Martin and Neil met 35 years ago, and they have put a lot of energy into renovating their home and back garden, injecting it with their personality. The same cant be said for their front garden, which is devoid of character - flat, dull, and uninspiring, with an impractical grassy area and a gate leading nowhere. With a penchant for quirky style, they would like a unique front garden to impress the neighbours.

programme.title: Rick Steins Road to Mexico
programme.desc: Rick Stein heads east from Oaxaca to the Yucatan Peninsula, a place once frequented by real pirates of the Caribbean, including Sir Francis Drake. Here, where the Europeans first landed over five hundred years ago, the local folk have lighter skins and blue or green eyes. They feast on the hottest chilli of them all, the habanero, and give slow food a new meaning as they bury and cook their Pibil dishes below ground on hot rocks.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The UCOS team reinvestigate the murder of Eddie Chapman, leader of a notorious criminal motorbike gang, The Braves, when new evidence is brought to them by an unlikely source. Pullman is also forced to reassess her position when an old colleague investigating the criminal activities of The Braves suggests she is wasting her career on unsolved and cold cases.

programme.title: Jonathan Creek
programme.desc: Frank Geiger is killed as he plots a drugs deal in the cellar of a remote farmhouse. When Geigers corpse is found months later, it has climbed to the top of the stairs, despite having received six bullets to its head. His killer, Harry Peacock, is terrified and fears that Geiger will kill him from beyond the grave. Can Sir Dennis Compton help Jonathan Creek provide an explanation for Geigers seemingly superhuman powers?

programme.title: Signora Volpe
programme.desc: Sylvia helps out on an archaeological dig at the Castello di Monterosa, and finds a skeleton buried in a shallow grave. The locals are convinced its that of a teenage girl who disappeared 25 years ago.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: A writers retreat on a picturesque estate generates ample inspiration when the mentor Dame Audrey McKinnon is found floating under a nearby waterfall.Contains Mature Themes.

programme.title: Whitechapel

programme.title: Simon Reeves South America
programme.desc: Simon travels through three of the worlds most extreme environments: the salt flats of Bolivia, the Brazilian Pantanal and Paraguays Chaco Forest. In Bolivia, Simon meets a family who makes a living carving salt from the Uyuni salt flats.

programme.title: Simon Reeves South America
programme.desc: Simon visits Brazil, the biggest country on the continent. He starts in one of the remotest regions of the Amazon, with the Waiapi people, who cling on to their traditional way of life, which is under threat from logging and mining interests.

programme.title: Simon Reeves South America

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: The Meldrews house is burgled, with the help of the neighbours, and Victor encounters an old school friend who mistakes him for someone else.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Mrs Warboys has an interesting tale to tell to two ladies in a tea shop. Victor has an even more interesting time with a chimpanzee at the local fete, but where is Margaret whilst all this is going on?

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victors brother Alfred pops over from New Zealand on one of his regular 25-yearly visits, and Victor is left in charge of Patrick and Pippas house while they are away.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor and Margaret go on a trip to Whipsnade Zoo, but their outing turns into a nightmare when they unexpectedly become imprisoned like the animals.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.sub-title: Beware the Trickster on the Roof
programme.desc: Victor and Margaret battle to rid their home of an evil Moroccan curse. Meanwhile, Victors neighbours put their house up for sale, but there are very few takers.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor celebrates his return to work, but is not pleased that his first day on the job involves a nasty case of vermin control. programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Will Stella Find True Love with Norris Fairburn?
programme.desc: When Clegg and Truly tell Hobbo that local serial groom Norris Fairburn is free again, he decides that Norris would be an ideal husband for Stella. At the cafe, Ivy observes and listens as Hobbo, Alvin and Entwistle discuss their fool-proof scheme. Later, Ivy warns Stella about the plot to provide her with one house-trained potential husband.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Will Randolph Make a Good Impression?
programme.desc: Hobbo turns up at the river wall with Randolph, who he hopes will bring romance into Stellas life. Randolph seems to lack any of the requirements of a potential suitor, and is limp and unattractive, especially after Hobbo drops him in the river. After a little rehearsal and some invaluable tips on how to give Stella `the look, Randolph demonstrates that he has no chance whatsoever of impressing her.

programme.desc: Gaz and Lee blue light to a lady whos been involved in an incident with a bin lorry, while Simone and Claire are called to a pensioner who has fallen in her bedroom.
